title: fagaropsis glabra
intro: Fagaropsis glabra is a plant species within the Meliaceae family, commonly known as the African sandalwood or African yellow sandalwood. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic activities. Fagaropsis glabra has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Fagaropsis glabra, including essential oils and extracts, are used to make perfumes, fragrances, and traditional remedies in African and Asian cultures.
